name: Sesame Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, chopped onion, salt, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and tabasco in a small bowl.
2. Whisk together until well mixed.
3. Slowly add the salad oil while continuously whisking to create an emulsified dressing.
4. Stir in the toasted sesame seeds, peanut butter, and roasted garlic to taste.
5. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
This recipe yields about 1 1/2 quarts of dressing, or six servings of approximately 2 tablespoons each.
